Issue_Notes: Morning batch completed on time.
Customer_Feedback: Love the faster dashboard, but the filters still feel clunky.

Issue_Notes: Short latency spike around checkout API.
Customer_Feedback: The checkout lag was frustrating and made me lose confidence.

Issue_Notes: Delayed ingest by 7 minutes due to queue backlog.
Customer_Feedback: Loved the export summary, it is clear and genuinely helpful.

Issue_Notes: Support ticket tagged urgent for retry failures.
Customer_Feedback: Retry loop was awful, but support responded quickly and fixed it.

Issue_Notes: No anomalies detected in this interval.
Customer_Feedback: Everything ran smoothly today and the forecast looked excellent.

Issue_Notes: Price jump flagged as high-severity anomaly.
Customer_Feedback: Great alert clarity, but I dislike how noisy the notifications are.

Issue_Notes: CSV row ordering changed after source system update.
Customer_Feedback: Sorting looked broken at first and gave me a bad first impression.

Issue_Notes: SLA warning triggered at 95th percentile latency.
Customer_Feedback: The new warning context is fantastic and made triage much easier.

Issue_Notes: Backfilled two missing records from previous hour.
Customer_Feedback: I appreciate the plain-language explanation, though the popup feels intrusive.

Issue_Notes: Volume drop detected after partner API timeout.
Customer_Feedback: Root-cause hints are missing and that makes debugging painful.

Issue_Notes: Ingestion lag exceeded threshold for 6 minutes.
Customer_Feedback: Lag warning helped a lot, but the color contrast is hard to read.

Issue_Notes: Duplicate event IDs detected and auto-deduplicated.
Customer_Feedback: Excellent cleanup, duplicates are gone and reports look much better.

Issue_Notes: Customer segment mix shifted unexpectedly.
Customer_Feedback: I am confused by the segment shift explanation and need clearer wording.

Issue_Notes: Anomaly score normalized after model retraining.
Customer_Feedback: Post-retrain trends look accurate, and I trust the model more now.

Issue_Notes: Late-arriving event corrected prior forecast window.
Customer_Feedback: Great correction speed, but I wish alerts arrived a bit earlier.

Issue_Notes: No data drift detected in product-level features.
Customer_Feedback: Stable run today, everything feels reliable and polished.

Issue_Notes: Transient nulls found in optional metadata field.
Customer_Feedback: Null handling prevented a crash, but the warning text sounded alarming.

Issue_Notes: Rate limiter engaged during traffic burst.
Customer_Feedback: Throughput stayed high, yet not seeing endpoint details is annoying.

Issue_Notes: Three failed retries before eventual success.
Customer_Feedback: Recovery was nice to see, but those retry errors were stressful.

Issue_Notes: Forecast confidence dropped below configured floor.
Customer_Feedback: Confidence tooltip was very helpful, though the confidence drop worried me.
